name: L1 Global Long Short Fund Limited
analysis: GLS has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.9875. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.0100, stop A$1.7078, target A$2.9167 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
